name: surf-skill
description: Multi-skill bundle for AI coding agents: surf-search-skill (multi-provider web search via Tavily + Parallel + Brave, with parallel fan-out), surf-plan-skill (research-driven execution planning), surf-parallel-skill (maximum-information parallel research), and surf-deep-plan-skill (ambiguity-exhaustive planning). Includes `surf` interactive setup with live key validation, automatic provider fallback, multi-key rotation, --mode tiers, per-project + --no-budget timeout config, and a Node library.

scripts.test:syntax: node --check bin/surf.mjs && node --check bin/surf-search-skill.mjs && node --check bin/surf-plan-skill.mjs && for f in src/index.mjs src/env.mjs src/install/*.mjs src/lib/*.mjs src/lib/providers/*.mjs src/lib/api/*.mjs src/plan/*.mjs src/validators/*.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo syntax-ok

author: frederico-kluser
